# Full RandomDay Family and Profile Reference

Version: `v0.3.15-alpha`

This file contains all 17 playstyle families, all 17 days per family, and the full SandboxSettings.ini values produced for each profile.

For smaller per-family pages, use `docs/profiles/families/`.

## Family Index

| Family | Genre | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Action | combat-forward operations | More shooting, more visible combat, less sneaking. |
| Survival | stealth survival against stronger threats | Fewer enemies, stronger threats, higher rewards, and less forgiveness. |
| Stealth | avoidance and surveillance pressure | Avoid detection. The facility is listening harder than usual. |
| Horde | crowd pressure and swarm control | Quantity problem. The facility has ordered too many hostiles. |
| Boss Hunt | elite target hunts | Rare severe encounters with trophy-level rewards and trophy-level mistakes. |
| Scavenger | loot routes and greedy risk | Loot routes are profitable, crowded, and morally unsupervised. |
| Builder | base expansion with controlled raids | Base expansion and logistics with occasional structural objections. |
| Expedition | travel and route hazards | Travel-focused run. Routes matter; lingering is discouraged. |
| Security Lockdown | patrols robots and alarms | Order, robots, patrols, detection, and too much procedure. |
| Biohazard | pest and contamination survival | Pests, contamination, water problems, and legally vague hygiene. |
| Anteverse | portal and variant pressure | Portal pressure, variants, and dimensional side effects. |
| Nightmare | dark horror and rare severe threats | Darkness, dread, rare severe threats, and quiet mistakes. |
| Weathered | environmental survival | Environmental survival: weather, radiation, power, hunger, thirst. |
| Precision | ranged lethality and detection | Fewer enemies, sharper aim, higher punishment for exposure. |
| Logistics | inventory economy and preparation | Transport, inventory, durability, weight, supply runs, prep economy. |
| Experimental | unstable mixed rules | Weird combinations, unstable tables, strange resistances. |
| Compliance Test | rotating final exam | A 17-day final exam across the facility's worst ideas. |

---

# Action Family

**Family ID:** `action`
**Genre:** combat-forward operations
**Tone:** loud facility optimism

More shooting, more visible combat, less sneaking.

## 17-Day Index

| Day | Profile | Experience | DynamicSpawns | Lethal Lasers | ANTE Up |
|---:|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | [Live Fire Orientation](#day-1-live-fire-orientation) | ACTION D01: baseline - combat. | `standard_pressure` | `standard_safety` | `standard` |
| 2 | [Open Floor Skirmish](#day-2-open-floor-skirmish) | ACTION D02: prep - combat. | `quiet_base_safe` | `low_hazard` | `quiet` |
| 3 | [Pest Control Drill](#day-3-pest-control-drill) | ACTION D03: resource - combat. | `biohazard_light` | `standard_safety` | `biohazard` |
| 4 | [Supply Run Firefight](#day-4-supply-run-firefight) | ACTION D04: loot - combat. | `low_pressure_loot_day` | `low_hazard` | `loot` |
| 5 | [Security Contact](#day-5-security-contact) | ACTION D05: security - combat. | `security_pressure` | `moderate_hazard` | `security` |
| 6 | [Weathered Engagement](#day-6-weathered-engagement) | ACTION D06: weather - combat. | `weather_wandering` | `electrical_hazard_light` | `weather` |
| 7 | [Night Raid](#day-7-night-raid) | ACTION D07: night - combat. | `night_pressure` | `night_visible_moderate` | `night` |
| 8 | [Route Runner](#day-8-route-runner) | ACTION D08: route - combat. | `speedrun_pressure` | `low_to_moderate_hazard` | `speedrun` |
| 9 | [Ration Riot](#day-9-ration-riot) | ACTION D09: scarcity - combat. | `scarcity_low_frequency` | `standard_safety` | `scarcity` |
| 10 | [Escort Recovery](#day-10-escort-recovery) | ACTION D10: recovery - combat. | `minimum_pressure` | `disabled_or_low_if_supported` | `recovery` |
| 11 | [Training Targets](#day-11-training-targets) | ACTION D11: training - combat. | `training_targets` | `training_hazard` | `training` |
| 12 | [Black Lab Assault](#day-12-black-lab-assault) | ACTION D12: major test - combat. | `hard_pressure` | `high_hazard` | `black_lab` |
| 13 | [Extended Fireline](#day-13-extended-fireline) | ACTION D13: endurance - combat. | `slow_attrition` | `standard_safety` | `attrition` |
| 14 | [Supply Closet Miracle](#day-14-supply-closet-miracle) | ACTION D14: relief - combat. | `relief_day` | `disabled_or_low_if_supported` | `relief` |
| 15 | [Accuracy Audit Live](#day-15-accuracy-audit-live) | ACTION D15: precision - combat. | `precision_patrols` | `moderate_hazard` | `accuracy` |
| 16 | [Experimental Crossfire](#day-16-experimental-crossfire) | ACTION D16: experiment - combat. | `experimental_mixed` | `weird_cycle_or_standard` | `experimental` |
| 17 | [Compliance War Game](#day-17-compliance-war-game) | ACTION D17: capstone - combat. | `capstone_pressure` | `overcharged_high_hazard` | `capstone` |

## Day 1 - Live Fire Orientation

**Profile ID:** `action_live_fire_orientation`  
**Base day ID:** `mostly_normal_allegedly`  
**Experience:** ACTION D01: baseline - combat.  
**Message:** Live Fire Orientation: Orientation begins politely. Ammo likes confidence.  
**Run advice:** Tip: Move fast. Fire loud. Today is baseline.

### Adapter Profiles

| Adapter | Profile/Value |
|---|---|
| `dynamic_spawns` | `standard_pressure` |
| `lethal_lasers` | `standard_safety` |
| `ante_up` | `standard` |
| `encounter_director` | `action_live_fire_orientation` |

---

# Survival Family

**Family ID:** `survival`
**Genre:** stealth survival against stronger threats
**Tone:** cruelly polite survival notice

Fewer enemies, stronger threats, higher rewards, and less forgiveness.

# Stealth Family

**Family ID:** `stealth`
**Genre:** avoidance and surveillance pressure
**Tone:** whispered corporate surveillance

Avoid detection. The facility is listening harder than usual.

---

# Boss Hunt Family

**Family ID:** `boss_hunt`
**Genre:** elite target hunts
**Tone:** trophy-board challenge notices

Rare severe encounters with trophy-level rewards and trophy-level mistakes.

## 17-Day Index

| Day | Profile | Experience | DynamicSpawns | Lethal Lasers | ANTE Up |
|---:|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | [Trophy Orientation](#day-1-trophy-orientation) | BOSS HUNT D01: baseline - elite hunt. | `standard_pressure` | `standard_safety` | `standard` |
| 2 | [Bait Construction](#day-2-bait-construction) | BOSS HUNT D02: prep - elite hunt. | `quiet_base_safe` | `low_hazard` | `quiet` |
| 3 | [Small Game Warning](#day-3-small-game-warning) | BOSS HUNT D03: resource - elite hunt. | `biohazard_light` | `standard_safety` | `biohazard` |
| 4 | [Reward Trail](#day-4-reward-trail) | BOSS HUNT D04: loot - elite hunt. | `low_pressure_loot_day` | `low_hazard` | `loot` |
| 5 | [Authorized Apex Problem](#day-5-authorized-apex-problem) | BOSS HUNT D05: security - elite hunt. | `hard_pressure` | `moderate_hazard` | `security` |

# Scavenger Family

**Family ID:** `scavenger`
**Genre:** loot routes and greedy risk
**Tone:** supply-chain jokes

Loot routes are profitable, crowded, and morally unsupervised.

---

# Builder Family

**Family ID:** `builder`
**Genre:** base expansion with controlled raids
**Tone:** clipboard construction comedy

Base expansion and logistics with occasional structural objections.

## 17-Day Index

| Day | Profile | Experience | DynamicSpawns | Lethal Lasers | ANTE Up |

# Expedition Family

Travel-focused run. Routes matter; lingering is discouraged.

---

# Security Lockdown Family

**Family ID:** `security_lockdown`
**Genre:** patrols robots and alarms
**Tone:** overbearing corporate security

Order, robots, patrols, detection, and too much procedure.

## 17-Day Index

| Day | Profile | Experience | DynamicSpawns | Lethal Lasers | ANTE Up |
|---:|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | [Badge Check Orientation](#day-1-badge-check-orientation) | LOCKDOWN D01: baseline - security. | `standard_pressure` | `standard_safety` | `standard` |
| 2 | [Barricade Filing](#day-2-barricade-filing) | LOCKDOWN D02: prep - security. | `quiet_base_safe` | `low_hazard` | `quiet` |
| 3 | [Hydration Checkpoint](#day-3-hydration-checkpoint) | LOCKDOWN D03: resource - security. | `biohazard_light` | `standard_safety` | `biohazard` |
| 4 | [Contraband Supply Route](#day-4-contraband-supply-route) | LOCKDOWN D04: loot - security. | `low_pressure_loot_day` | `low_hazard` | `loot` |

# Biohazard Family

# Anteverse Family

**Family ID:** `anteverse`
**Genre:** portal and variant pressure
**Tone:** dimensional HR understatement

Portal pressure, variants, and dimensional side effects.

# Weathered Family

**Family ID:** `weathered`
**Genre:** environmental survival
**Tone:** meteorology apology

Environmental survival: weather, radiation, power, hunger, thirst.

| Day | Profile | Experience | DynamicSpawns | Lethal Lasers | ANTE Up |

| 1 | [Forecast Orientation](#day-1-forecast-orientation) | WEATHERED D01: baseline - weather. | `standard_pressure` | `standard_safety` | `standard` |

# Precision Family

**Family ID:** `precision`
**Genre:** ranged lethality and detection
**Tone:** audit and accuracy language

Fewer enemies, sharper aim, higher punishment for exposure.

# Logistics Family

**Family ID:** `logistics`
**Genre:** inventory economy and preparation
**Tone:** inventory bureaucracy

Transport, inventory, durability, weight, supply runs, prep economy.

## 17-Day Index

| Day | Profile | Experience | DynamicSpawns | Lethal Lasers | ANTE Up |
|---:|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | [Inventory Orientation](#day-1-inventory-orientation) | LOGISTICS D01: baseline - inventory. | `standard_pressure` | `standard_safety` | `standard` |
| 2 | [Open Floor Storage](#day-2-open-floor-storage) | LOGISTICS D02: prep - inventory. | `quiet_base_safe` | `disabled_or_low_if_supported` | `quiet` |
| 3 | [Hydration Paperwork](#day-3-hydration-paperwork) | LOGISTICS D03: resource - inventory. | `biohazard_light` | `standard_safety` | `biohazard` |
| 4 | [Supply Chain Celebration](#day-4-supply-chain-celebration) | LOGISTICS D04: loot - inventory. | `low_pressure_loot_day` | `low_hazard` | `loot` |
| 5 | [Security of Receipts](#day-5-security-of-receipts) | LOGISTICS D05: security - inventory. | `security_pressure` | `moderate_hazard` | `security` |
| 6 | [Weathered Freight](#day-6-weathered-freight) | LOGISTICS D06: weather - inventory. | `weather_wandering` | `electrical_hazard_light` | `weather` |
| 7 | [Night Stocktake](#day-7-night-stocktake) | LOGISTICS D07: night - inventory. | `night_pressure` | `night_visible_moderate` | `night` |
| 8 | [Route Optimization Memo](#day-8-route-optimization-memo) | LOGISTICS D08: route - inventory. | `speedrun_pressure` | `low_to_moderate_hazard` | `speedrun` |
| 9 | [Ration Ledger](#day-9-ration-ledger) | LOGISTICS D09: scarcity - inventory. | `scarcity_low_frequency` | `standard_safety` | `scarcity` |
| 10 | [Recovery Repack](#day-10-recovery-repack) | LOGISTICS D10: recovery - inventory. | `minimum_pressure` | `disabled_or_low_if_supported` | `recovery` |
| 11 | [Safety Label Training](#day-11-safety-label-training) | LOGISTICS D11: training - inventory. | `training_targets` | `training_hazard` | `training` |
| 12 | [Black Lab Logistics Review](#day-12-black-lab-logistics-review) | LOGISTICS D12: major test - inventory. | `hard_pressure` | `high_hazard` | `black_lab` |

# Experimental Family

**Family ID:** `experimental`
**Genre:** unstable mixed rules
**Tone:** lab notes approved by no one responsible

Weird combinations, unstable tables, strange resistances.

---

# Compliance Test Family

**Family ID:** `compliance_test`
**Genre:** rotating final exam
**Tone:** triumphant corporate cruelty

A 17-day final exam across the facility's worst ideas.

## 17-Day Index

| Day | Profile | Experience | DynamicSpawns | Lethal Lasers | ANTE Up |
|---:|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | [Compliance Intake](#day-1-compliance-intake) | COMPLIANCE D01: baseline - exam. | `standard_pressure` | `standard_safety` | `standard` |
| 2 | [Structural Compliance](#day-2-structural-compliance) | COMPLIANCE D02: prep - exam. | `quiet_base_safe` | `low_hazard` | `quiet` |
| 3 | [Hydration Compliance](#day-3-hydration-compliance) | COMPLIANCE D03: resource - exam. | `biohazard_light` | `standard_safety` | `biohazard` |
| 4 | [Supply Compliance](#day-4-supply-compliance) | COMPLIANCE D04: loot - exam. | `low_pressure_loot_day` | `low_hazard` | `loot` |
| 5 | [Security Compliance](#day-5-security-compliance) | COMPLIANCE D05: security - exam. | `security_pressure` | `moderate_hazard` | `security` |
| 6 | [Weather Compliance](#day-6-weather-compliance) | COMPLIANCE D06: weather - exam. | `weather_wandering` | `electrical_hazard_light` | `weather` |
| 7 | [Night Compliance](#day-7-night-compliance) | COMPLIANCE D07: night - exam. | `night_pressure` | `night_visible_moderate` | `night` |
| 8 | [Route Compliance](#day-8-route-compliance) | COMPLIANCE D08: route - exam. | `speedrun_pressure` | `low_to_moderate_hazard` | `speedrun` |
| 9 | [Ration Compliance](#day-9-ration-compliance) | COMPLIANCE D09: scarcity - exam. | `scarcity_low_frequency` | `standard_safety` | `scarcity` |
| 10 | [Recovery Compliance](#day-10-recovery-compliance) | COMPLIANCE D10: recovery - exam. | `minimum_pressure` | `disabled_or_low_if_supported` | `recovery` |
| 11 | [Training Compliance](#day-11-training-compliance) | COMPLIANCE D11: training - exam. | `training_targets` | `training_hazard` | `training` |
| 12 | [Black Lab Compliance](#day-12-black-lab-compliance) | COMPLIANCE D12: major test - exam. | `hard_pressure` | `high_hazard` | `black_lab` |
| 13 | [Overtime Compliance](#day-13-overtime-compliance) | COMPLIANCE D13: endurance - exam. | `slow_attrition` | `standard_safety` | `attrition` |
| 14 | [Supply Miracle Compliance](#day-14-supply-miracle-compliance) | COMPLIANCE D14: relief - exam. | `relief_day` | `disabled_or_low_if_supported` | `relief` |
| 15 | [Accuracy Compliance](#day-15-accuracy-compliance) | COMPLIANCE D15: precision - exam. | `precision_patrols` | `moderate_hazard` | `accuracy` |
| 16 | [Experimental Compliance](#day-16-experimental-compliance) | COMPLIANCE D16: experiment - exam. | `experimental_mixed` | `weird_cycle_or_standard` | `experimental` |
| 17 | [Final Compliance Test](#day-17-final-compliance-test) | COMPLIANCE D17: capstone - exam. | `capstone_pressure` | `overcharged_high_hazard` | `capstone` |
